legend.automated: Verified in the authoring DOM by an it() block.
legend.deferred: Documented as it.skip() — requires OS file-picker zip upload, Preview/Reader rendering, runtime popup/inline behaviour, panel-drag, delete-during-upload, or persistence-after-reload.

mappings.it: TC_DROP / TC_01 — Drop HTML Interactivity element onto the Instructions canvas
TC_02 — Drop is constrained to the canvas (not allowed on Generic Step)
mappings.note: framework drop guard rejects element drops where a GenericStep owns the canvas

mappings.it: TC_03 / TC_23 — Zip upload box is present in settings (Upload .zip)
mappings.note: control presence automated; real zip processing deferred

mappings.reason: Reject unsupported upload format (.exe/.txt) — OS file picker + server-side validation

mappings.it: TC_05 / TC_10 — Upload box doubles as the replace surface (label flips on fileuploaded)
mappings.note: real replace is a runtime upload flow (deferred)

mappings.reason: Reject corrupt/invalid zip on replace — file picker + server processing ("Please try a valid zip file" modal #html-interactivity-valid)
Style changes reflected in editor AND preview — Preview rendering flow

mappings.it: TC_05 / TC_10 — Upload box doubles as the replace surface (label flips on fileuploaded)
mappings.note: different-size replace is a runtime upload flow (deferred)

mappings.reason: Popup vs Inline display behaviour in preview — Preview runtime behaviour (radios name='showInteractivity' present in settings)

mappings.it: TC_12 — "Show Header" checkbox toggles the header field

mappings.reason: Settings panel remains fixed when moved — drag/position runtime behaviour not DOM-assertable in this harness

mappings.it: TC_14 — Left-panel icon class is the source-defined HTML Interactivity icon
mappings.note: icon class automated; exact #ffffff hex is a CSS/theme assertion (deferred)

mappings.it: TC_15 — "Show Caption" checkbox toggles the caption field
TC_16 — Entered header and caption are visible in the editor
TC_17 — Component can be deleted from the canvas via the delete icon
TC_18 — "No Outline" radio is present and selectable (default)
TC_19 — "Outline & Fill Background" reveals colour swatches
TC_20 — Background colour picker reflects a selected hex code
TC_21 — Long header/caption text is accepted (wraps in all views)
TC_22 — Tags, Accessibility heading and Alt Text fields are present
TC_03 / TC_23 — Zip upload box is present in settings (Upload .zip)
mappings.note: accepts-and-renders zip is a runtime upload flow (deferred)

mappings.reason: Reject oversized zip (beyond limit) — file picker + server-side size validation

mappings.it: TC_25 — Header displays heavy text without truncation
TC_26 — Heavy header + caption entered (duplication is a deferred runtime action)
TC_27 — Header + component render together (text entry then upload)
mappings.note: zip portion is a runtime upload flow (deferred)

mappings.reason: Reader launches with valid credentials — Reader login/launch flow
Component data displays correctly in Reader — Reader rendering flow

mappings.it: TC_31 — Author-entered markup is not executed in the authoring DOM
mappings.note: DOM-assertable script-restriction automated; malicious-zip rejection + security warning is server-side (deferred)

mappings.it: TC_32 — Only a single valid drop is accepted (no duplicate from one drop)
mappings.note: rapid/invalid drops rejected by the drop guard

mappings.reason: Delete gracefully during an ongoing upload — requires a live upload in flight

mappings.it: TC_34 — Alt text / tags accept and retain entered values (maxlength enforced)

mappings.reason: Style (border/background/icon) persists after page reload — persistence-after-reload flow
